package handler

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"fmt"
	"log"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

type UserDTO struct {
	ID       string `json:"id" binding:"required"`
	Name     string `json:"name" binding:"required"`
	Email    string `json:"email" binding:"required"`
	TenantID string `json:"tenant_id"`
}

type UserService struct {
	logger *log.Logger
}

func (s *UserService) CreateUser(ctx context.Context, dto UserDTO) error {
	if dto.Email == "" {
		err := fmt.Errorf("failed to create user: email is required for user %s", dto.Name)
		s.logger.Printf("service: error creating user: %v", err)
		return err
	}
	return nil
}

func CreateUserHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	svc := &UserService{logger: log.Default()}

	var dto UserDTO
	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&dto); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
		return
	}

	ctx := context.Background()
	if err := svc.CreateUser(ctx, dto); err != nil {
		log.Printf("handler: error creating user: %v", err)
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
		return
	}

	c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, gin.H{"message": "user created"})
}
